settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Choose which AI providers power analysis, chat and embeddings.
settings.keysTitle: API keys are read from environment variables
settings.chatModelDesc: Used for splitting the rulebook, generating setup/pieces, and answering questions.
settings.modelHelp: Pick a model (type to add a custom id)
settings.embeddingModelDesc: Used for RAG vector search. Anthropic has no embeddings API — use OpenAI or LM Studio.
settings.embeddingWarnDesc: Each game stores the embedding model used at ingestion. New settings apply to newly uploaded games; existing games keep their original embeddings.
